title: Nazar Stodolya
actors: Domian Kozachkovskiy, Taisiya Litvinenko, Nikolay Zimovets
plot: The beautiful Galya and the brave Cossack Nazar Stodolya fell passionately in love. But Gali's father, centurion Khoma Kichaty, wants to marry his daughter to an old but rich colonel. Next events are in movie.
